name: HEAD servo GPIO17 RGB LED order
notes: Single 180-degree positional head servo on GPIO17 using HEAD SERVO 0-180 / HEAD LEFT / HEAD RIGHT / HEAD CENTER. Servo attached with 500-2500us pulse range. LED strip uses NEO_RGB color order so HEAD LED R G B matches dashboard swatches.

name: HEAD 180 servo RGB LED order
notes: Single 180-degree positional head servo on pin 33 using HEAD SERVO 0-180 / HEAD LEFT / HEAD RIGHT / HEAD CENTER. Servo attached with 500-2500us pulse range. LED strip uses NEO_RGB color order so HEAD LED R G B matches dashboard swatches.

name: HEAD continuous servo pulse control
notes: Continuous head servo uses microsecond pulses, supports HEAD LEFT/RIGHT/STOP, HEAD SERVO 90, HEAD SERVO 1 90, HEAD PULSE, and HEAD NEUTRAL_US.

name: HEAD RGB direct servo control
notes: Direct RGB LED control, brightness support, continuous head servo controls.

name: RESTORED - HEAD servos + LED effects
